entities.name: IMPROVED LIVESTOCK FEED TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies introduced to increase the production and availability of quality feed for livestock

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION
entities.description: The activity of raising livestock for food and other products

entities.name: SEASONAL SCARCITY OF QUALITY FEED
entities.description: A bottleneck and limitation to livestock production in agro-pastoral systems

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A country in the West African Sahel where the study was conducted

entities.name: LOGIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to identify factors affecting the likelihood of using improved feed technologies

entities.name: EDUCATION LEVEL
entities.description: A factor that positively impacts the probability of using improved livestock feed technologies

entities.name: MEMBERSHIP OF FARMER GROUPS
entities.description: A factor that positively impacts the probability of using improved livestock feed technologies

entities.name: SMALL RUMINANT
entities.description: Livestock animals whose ownership enhances the probability of using improved feed technologies

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL AREA
entities.description: A determinant factor in the use of improved livestock feed technologies

entities.name: FAMILY SIZE
entities.description: A factor influencing the use of improved livestock feed technologies

entities.name: LOW PRODUCTIVITY OF LIVESTOCK
entities.description: A problem that can be alleviated by the utilization of improved livestock feed technologies

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD FOOD SECURITY AND NUTRITION
entities.description: An outcome that can be improved through the use of improved livestock feed technologies
